name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
ℹ️ How to use Group File Share Manager:

📤 Upload files and create shareable links for your group
🔗 Manage active links — view, adjust, or revoke them
📊 View access logs to see who downloaded what

Tap /start to open the main menu and pick what you need.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
